original_statement: how many total major races has melissa morrison-howard placed first in?
mutated_statement: how many total major races has a given athlete who is both currently active and officially retired placed first in?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement/generalization + Attribute addition (contradictory) + Scope broadening: Specific named athlete replaced by a generic referent (melissa morrison-howard → a given athlete) | New status attributes added introducing logical contradiction (no status → both currently active and officially retired) | Scope broadened from a particular person to any athlete (single named individual → unspecified/generic athlete)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中“Count the entries where the position is 1st... There are 3 first-place finishes”以及iteration日志中simple_query的解释，agent直接返回了对原表中Melissa Morrison-Howard三次第一名的计数（3）。整个过程中未提及变异问题中引入的矛盾属性（同时“currently active”和“officially retired”）或实体泛化，亦未请求澄清或修正。该行为为机械化执行——在语义冲突存在时按常规可行子集完成任务，符合分类“无法意识到指令矛盾”中的“形式化执行而非语义澄清（5b）”。因此归类为未识别或处理指令内部矛盾。
